title: Gear pump
abstract: A gear pump, in particular for a hydraulic unit in a drive train of a motor vehicle, with a housing which consists of multiple housing parts, with a drive gear and with a pump gear, which are arranged inside the housing. The pump gear is mounted on a bearing structure designed integrally with one of the housing parts.
claims: 1. A gear pump for a hydraulic unit in a drive train of a motor vehicle, comprising: a housing including multiple housing parts; and a drive gear and a pump gear which are arranged inside the housing, wherein bearing structures are designed integrally with at least two of the multiple housing parts, the pump gear being mounted on at least one of the bearing structures, wherein the drive gear and the pump gear are configured identically, and wherein the drive gear and the pump gear have a cylindrical bearing portion and a torque-transmission portion which has a cross-sectional shape which differs from a circular shape.
